notes: Lidl homepage. Heavy JS-rendered content. Search bar at top, category icon navigation, product tiles, newsletter signup in footer. Cookie consent banner may or may not render in fixture mode.

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search input at the top of the page

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Top-level category navigation with icons (Sortiment, Rezepte, Filialen, etc.)

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Footer links including legal, company info, social media

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: Cookie consent overlay with accept/settings options at bottom of page
